data.title: Incorporate Architect Agent Pattern into implementation plan
data.description:
## The Architect Agent Pattern

Before any code is generated, a specialized "Architect" agent (or a strictly prompted planning phase) must map the new feature against existing system patterns, component boundaries, and utility files. The builder agent is then explicitly restricted to utilizing those specific, pre-existing shared libraries.

This pattern should be incorporated into the implementation plan workflow to ensure that every implementation plan is grounded in the actual codebase architecture before tasks are generated.
